ddls:
CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse in years */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (e.g., Colt, Filly) */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer responsible for the horse */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the horse */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "father_id" INTEGER /* ID of the father horse */,
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mother horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Primary owner of the horse */,
  "stable" TEXT /* Name of the stable where the horse is kept */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the horse was registered with the organization */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_father_id FOREIGN KEY ("father_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_mother_id FOREIGN KEY ("mother_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date the race occurred */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the racetrack where the race was held */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "surface" TEXT /* Surface type of the race (e.g., dirt, turf) */,
  "race_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the race */,
  "race_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., stakes, allowance) */,
  "race_grade" TEXT /* Grade of the race (e.g., Grade 1, Grade 2) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Track condition (e.g., fast, sloppy) */,
  "purse_amount" REAL /* Total purse amount for the race */,
  "number_of_horses" INTEGER /* Number of horses in the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse in the race */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race where the performance occurred */,
  "bris_speed" INTEGER /* Bris Speed rating for the performance */,
  "finish_position" INTEGER /* Finish position of the horse in the race */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight carried by the horse in the race */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey riding the horse */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the horse in the race */,
  "final_time" TEXT /* Final time taken by the horse to complete the race */,
  "odds" REAL /* Betting odds for the horse */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings from the race */,
  "post_position" INTEGER /* Post position of the horse */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Any additional comments or notes about the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each racetrack */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the racetrack */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the racetrack */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface on which races are conducted */,
  "track_open_date" TEXT /* Date the track opened */,
  "track_close_date" TEXT /* Date the track closed (if applicable) */,
  "track_length" TEXT /* Length of the track */,
  "track_elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the track */,
  "track_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the track */,
  "track_website" TEXT /* URL of the track's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the trainer */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience as a trainer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the trainer */,
  "training_licenses" TEXT /* List of training licenses held by the trainer */,
  "training_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements of the trainer */,
  "training_style" TEXT /* Training style or philosophy of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the owner */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date the owner started owning horses */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date the owner stopped owning horses (if applicable) */,
  "ownership_achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements as an owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ownerships" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse owned */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of ownership the owner has in the horse */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership began */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership ended (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for any change in ownership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownerships_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ownerships_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races_horses" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id", "horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, trainer, analyst) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences for the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis findings */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis conducted */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis findings */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
